description: §42 — a value-form `match` over a `T | not` (optional) subject (`match r` where `r: Role | not`) that provides arms for the present-case variants but NO `not` arm and NO `else`/`_` wildcard is non-exhaustive on the absence case and SHALL fire E-MATCH-012. Regression guard: the `T | not` absence arm is the §42 discrimination point; dropping it silently would let an absent value fall through unhandled. NOTE (impl#1 oracle): impl#1 CO-FIRES E-TYPE-006 here (its value-form union checker also treats the `Role` member as uncovered — see the divergence recorded on the NEG sibling); E-MATCH-012 is the target code this case pins.
rationale: §42 (SPEC.md:23152): 'A `match` on `T | not` without a `not` arm or `else` arm SHALL be compile error E-MATCH-012.' The match supplies `.Admin` / `.Editor` present-case arms but neither a `not` arm nor an `else`/`_` wildcard, so the absence case is unhandled.
